title: ornithoxanthum gracile
intro: Ornithoxanthum gracile is a type of flowering plant, specifically a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Ornithoxanthum gracile has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Ornithoxanthum gracile may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
